message:
fix(release): pin frankensqlite to 2ed140c (restores PageCache fields)

Rev c3995c8 was missing admits/evictions/pool fields on PageCache.
Rev 2ed140c restores the complete PageCache API. This revision includes
all prior fixes: lifecycle.rs Arc alignment, foldhash dep, and pager arity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 parking_lot = "*"
@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@ rand = "0.10"

 # frankensqlite compat gate tests (bead 3vvqa) — fsqlite-types needed for SqliteValue

-fsqlite-types = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "c3995c8" }
